summary: Frontend testing of TruckersNav iteration 9: Compass Rose overlay on map. All 15 review items PASS via code review + browser automation. Compass rose is visible bottom-left, gold in GPS mode, blue in compass mode, cardinal labels all rendered, bearing format correct, filter panel and Load Board both functional.
critical_code_review_comments: CompassRose.tsx line 87: data-testid='compass-rose' is on the outer div wrapper, not on the SVG itself — no functional impact but worth noting for future testid disambiguation
CompassRose.tsx lines 39-47: GPS heading subscription correctly guarded with `if (isCompassMode || !telemetry) return` — no double-subscription issue
CompassRose.tsx lines 50-68: deviceorientation handler correctly adds both 'deviceorientationabsolute' and 'deviceorientation' listeners with proper cleanup on unmount
NavigationView.tsx line 4779-4785: CompassRose placed as sibling BEFORE nav-arrival-hud (lines 4787+) — correct placement, not nested inside HUD
PRE-EXISTING BUG (from iteration 8, unchanged): L.point().rotate() is not a standard Leaflet method — NavigationView.tsx lines 3196 and 3256. Caught by try-catch, no crash.

test_results.app_loads_no_errors: PASS — Dashboard renders cleanly, no JS errors on load
test_results.compass_rose_container_in_dom: PASS — data-testid='compass-rose-container' present (hidden on Dashboard, visible in Navigation view with left-3/md:left-5 positioning)
test_results.compass_rose_svg_rendered: PASS — SVG bbox {x:276, y:864, w:84, h:104} confirmed visible in Navigation view
test_results.telemetry_context_subscription: PASS — useContext(TelemetryContext) at line 28; GPS subscription at lines 39-47 with isCompassMode guard
test_results.deviceorientation_listener: PASS — lines 50-68: both 'deviceorientationabsolute' and 'deviceorientation' listeners added when isCompassMode=true
test_results.needle_polygon_gold_amber: PASS — Polygon 1 fill: #D4AF37 in GPS mode (gold/amber)
test_results.rotating_group_cardinals: PASS — transform='rotate(0 42 42)'; all 8 labels N/NE/E/SE/S/SW/W/NW found in SVG texts
test_results.cardinal_abbreviation_display: PASS — 'N' shown as second text element in bearing display pill
test_results.compass_rose_bottom_left_not_in_hud: PASS — container classes include 'left-3 md:left-5'; querySelector('#nav-arrival-hud [data-testid=compass-rose-container]') returns null
test_results.compass_mode_blue_accent: PASS — after click: drop-shadow rgba(59,130,246,0.35); Polygon 1 fill: #3B82F6; title changes to 'Compass Mode Active — tap to disable'
test_results.filter_panel_no_errors: PASS — FILTERS panel opened, no error elements found
test_results.load_board_works: PASS — Ghost Dispatcher shows 8 loads nearby with freight data (mocked)

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at http://localhost:8001. Vite+Express single-stack. Splash screen ~4.5s. Navigation view accessible via sidebar 'Navigation' link. CompassRose is bottom-left of map (classes: absolute bottom-[calc(7rem+...)] left-3 md:left-5 z-[2005]). compass-mode-btn testid on right-side MapControls panel. In GPS mode: gold (#D4AF37) glow + polygon fill. In compass mode: blue (#3B82F6) glow + polygon fill + blue dot indicator at top-right of rose. Bearing display: two separate SVG text elements — degrees ('000°') and cardinal abbreviation ('N'). MOCKED: Load Board freight data, DeviceOrientationEvent. PRE-EXISTING BUG (not introduced): L.point().rotate() not a standard Leaflet method at NavigationView.tsx lines 3196 & 3256 (try-caught, no crash).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no new bugs introduced. All compass rose features working as specified.
